flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 32% at Lee College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (5.1k vs 7.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Lee College fell 28% between 2021 and 2024 (7.1k → 5.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lee College rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.3k → $5.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lee College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.2k → $2.5k).
